Meta.title: Zingspark — Where Agents Come Alive
Meta.description: Zingspark is a research lab engineering autonomous agents that perceive, reason, and operate across digital and physical environments.

Hero.description: Language models think. Agents do. We build the systems that close the gap between reasoning and real-world execution.

Vision.subtitle: Building agents that don't just understand the world — they operate in it.
Vision.description: We research and engineer autonomous agent systems — from multi-step planning and tool orchestration to embodied interaction — designed to work reliably in open-ended environments.

framework.title: Agent Architecture
framework.description: Deep fluency in multi-agent orchestration, planning pipelines, and tool-use protocols. We contribute to and build upon the leading open-source agent infrastructure.

hardware.title: Digital to Physical
hardware.description: Extending agent capabilities from screen-bound tasks to sensor-rich, real-world environments — bridging code and hardware into unified systems.

global.title: Global-Native
global.description: A team that thinks, ships, and collaborates across borders — with a research stack aligned to the global state of the art.

Universities.title: Built by Minds from the World's Leading Institutions

Jobs.title: We're Hiring
Jobs.subtitle: The problems are hard. The team is small. The impact is real.

Recruitment.title: Work With Us
Recruitment.subtitle: If you care about making agents that actually work, we should talk.
Recruitment.name: Full Name
